# Presio

> Present PDFs locally or live across devices. Local by default — your PDF stays in the browser unless you sync.

Presio is a PDF presentation tool: controller + viewer windows, speaker notes, embedded media, and optional online sync.

## For AI agents

- [Full agent playbook](BASE/llms-full.txt): present + check workflows in one file
- [Agent brief](BASE/AGENTS.md): capabilities, limits, when to use which endpoint
- [API (markdown)](BASE/api.md): REST reference with curl examples
- [OpenAPI](BASE/openapi.json): machine-readable API schema
- [MCP server card](BASE/.well-known/mcp.json): connect at BASE/mcp (no auth; chat assistants without HTTP tools: have your user add BASE/mcp as a custom connector, then retry)

## Docs

- [About](BASE/about.md): how Presio works
- [Checker](BASE/check.md): validate notes/media sidecars
- [Home](BASE/index.md): product overview

## Optional

- [Sitemap](BASE/sitemap.xml)
- [Check report schema](BASE/schema/check-report.schema.json)
